evidence: DenoiseAudioPacket (kind "denoise.audio") and DenoisedAudioPacket (kind "denoise.result", with noiseReduced/confidence) are declared in packages/voice/src/packets.ts:132-142, exported from index.ts:25-26, and listed in the packet union (packets.ts:481-482). But there is NO runtime emitter or listener: grep for 'denoise.audio'/'denoise.result'/'noiseReduced'/'kind: "denoise' across packages/ (excluding packets.ts) returns nothing; there is no make.denoise* factory. handleUserAudio (voice-agent-session.ts:527-546) routes user audio straight to recordUserAudio + vadAudio + sttAudio + eosAudio with no denoise stage: e.g. lines 539-545 push make.vadAudio/make.sttAudio/make.eosAudio. No denoiser plugin package ships (packages/: voice-stt-deepgram, voice-stt-google, voice-tts-*, voice-vad-silero, voice-turn-pipecat, etc. - no denoiser). The only other 'Denoiser' references are dead scaffolding: an InitStage.Denoiser enum/ordering in init-stage-order.ts:27-77 and a comment in mode-switcher.ts:6 / plugin-contract.ts:5 - a stage that no plugin ever registers for. The checklist STT-11 (PRODUCTION-CHECKLIST.md:382, wiki/stt-map.md:13) calls for denoising before VAD/STT.
real_fix: Two acceptable resolutions. (1) Document-and-prune: since no caller exists, treat the denoise packet types + InitStage.Denoiser stage as dead code - either delete DenoiseAudioPacket/DenoisedAudioPacket from packets.ts (132-142, 481-482), index.ts (25-26) and the Denoiser stage from init-stage-order.ts, and document that the transport must supply clean audio; or (2) Ship a minimal denoiser plugin (e.g. RNNoise-style) implementing the plugin-contract, register it in the Denoiser init stage, and insert a denoise step in handleUserAudio so audio is cleaned before make.vadAudio/make.sttAudio at voice-agent-session.ts:539-545. Recommended near-term: option (1) - delete the orphan types and add a one-line doc note - to avoid an API that implies a capability the engine does not have. Severity stays medium: it is a missing-feature / dead-scaffolding gap (quality degradation in noisy environments), not a crash or correctness bug.
files: packages/voice/src/packets.ts:132-142,481-482; packages/voice/src/index.ts:25-26; packages/voice/src/voice-agent-session.ts:527-546 (handleUserAudio, denoise stage absent); packages/voice/src/init-stage-order.ts:27-77 (orphan Denoiser stage)
